name: Transcoding Policy
description: Applies narrowly scoped transcoding rules before Jellyfin chooses a hardware output encoder. The default rule works around VideoToolbox failures for MPEG-2 Live TV by using libx264 while leaving other transcodes unchanged.
overview: Selectively force software encoding for matching transcodes.

versions.changelog: Load the embedded Harmony runtime from a non-collectible assembly context so the policy patch can install under Jellyfin 10.11.11's collectible plugin loader. The release package no longer ships a standalone 0Harmony.dll.

name: Commercial Skipper
description: Runs an external Comskip executable against completed recordings and publishes native Jellyfin Commercial media segments without modifying the media file.
overview: Detect commercials in DVR recordings with Comskip.

versions.changelog: Initial release with DVR library discovery, coordinated Comskip analysis, native Jellyfin Commercial segments, scheduled reconciliation, and admin controls.
